TypeSignature.Value: .class public sequential ansi sealed beforefieldinit SKFourByteTag extends System.ValueType implements class System.IEquatable`1<valuetype SkiaSharp.SKFourByteTag>

Docs.summary: Represents a four-byte tag used to identify font variation axes, OpenType tables, and other font features.

MemberSignature.Value: public SKFourByteTag (uint value);
.method public hidebysig specialname rtspecialname instance void .ctor(unsigned int32 value) cil managed

Docs.param: The packed unsigned integer whose bytes represent the four ASCII characters of the tag.
Docs.summary: Initializes a new instance of the struct from a packed unsigned integer.

The second character of the tag.

The fourth character of the tag.

Docs.param: The string to parse. Only the first four characters are used; shorter strings are padded with spaces.
Docs.returns: An representing the first four characters of , padded with spaces if shorter.

Docs.summary: Returns the string representation of the tag as four ASCII characters.
